title: Nozzy Glass Teapot with Stainless Steel Infuser, 800ml Borosilicate Tea Pot, Clear Modern Design with Strainer for Loose Tea, 4-6 Cups
features: CAPACITY: Medium 800ml glass teapot perfect for serving 2-4 cups of tea, ideal for family gatherings or entertaining guests
PREMIUM MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality borosilicate glass that offers excellent heat resistance and durability. Metal Handle. Handmade with care.
INFUSER DESIGN: Features a removable stainless steel infuser that allows for easy brewing of loose leaf teas whilst preventing leaves from escaping
MODERN AESTHETIC: Sleek, transparent design showcases the tea's brewing process and colour development whilst complementing any kitchen décor
PRACTICAL FEATURES: Wide opening for easy cleaning and filling, whilst the ergonomic handle ensures comfortable and secure pouring
description: Elevate your tea-drinking experience with this elegant 800ml glass teapot from Nozzy. Crafted from premium borosilicate glass, this teapot combines modern aesthetics with practical functionality. The clear glass design allows you to appreciate the mesmerising dance of tea leaves as they steep, ensuring the perfect brew every time. The integrated stainless steel infuser is ideal for loose leaf teas, providing ample room for leaves to unfurl and release their full flavour. With a generous 800ml capacity, this teapot serves 2-4 cups comfortably, making it perfect for both solo contemplation and shared moments with friends. The borosilicate glass construction offers superior heat resistance and durability, while the thoughtfully designed spout ensures smooth, drip-free pouring. Whether you're brewing delicate green teas or robust black blends, this teapot delivers a refined tea service that tea enthusiasts will appreciate.
